commit.message:
docs: add Phase 5 overall completion summary

Phase 5 progress: 50% complete (4/8 tasks)

Completed:
- Week 1-2: AI Recommendation System + AI-Enhanced Search
- Week 3-4: Data Warehouse + BI Dashboard

Remaining:
- Week 5-6: Internationalization + Multi-Region Deployment
- Week 7-8: Service Mesh + GitOps

Total deliverables:
- 5,990+ lines of code
- 3 Rust crates
- 2 React components
- 24 unit tests
- 9 complete documents
- 3 example programs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Change prior day low/high alerts from BUY/SELL to NOTICE

Prior day low reclaim, resistance at prior high, and prior day low
resistance are key level notifications, not actionable trade signals.
Changed direction to NOTICE so they display as informational alerts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add Task 6.3-6.4 completion summary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: move linear_probe to src/evaluation, add local test script

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Change weekly/planned level touch from BUY to NOTICE

These alerts flag key price levels but aren't always actionable buy
signals. Direction changed to NOTICE so they show as informational
in Telegram/email. They no longer create active entries or trigger
paper trades.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve AiModelPage crash from backend response shape mismatch

Root cause: Backend /api/ai-model/providers returned {name, modelCount}
but frontend expected {id, name, description, available, configured}.
Backend /api/ai-model/models returned {provider, modelId, costPerToken}
but frontend expected {id, name, capabilities[], tier, badge, ...}.
Calling .map() on undefined capabilities array crashed the page.

Changes:
- Backend: Update GetProviders to return id/name/description/available
- Backend: Update GetModels to return rich AvailableModelDto with
  capabilities, tier, badge, costs from ModelCapabilities registry
- Backend: Optimize GetServiceOverrides — batch-load admin mappings
  and user overrides in 2 queries instead of N+1 pattern (6+ queries)
- Frontend: Add defensive ?? [] guard on model.capabilities.map()
- Frontend: Add ?? 0 guard on stats.estimatedCost.toFixed()
- Tests: Add userApiKeys mock to prevent unhandled fetch in tests

Refs #2634

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs(architecture): document ad_spend consistency fix between Ventas and P&L pages

Added two new sections to ARCHITECTURE.md:

1. "Fix Permanente: Consistencia Página Ventas vs P&L (Mar 4, 2026)"
   - Documents the $5,078 MXN ad_spend discrepancy that was missing from
     the Ventas page because it only read from ledger_entries, while P&L
     also queries advertising_metrics separately
   - Explains the fix: getTrends now also queries advertising_metrics per day
   - Includes code snippet for the permanent solution
   - Lists UI improvements (tooltip visibility fixes)
   - Establishes permanent rule: analytics data in multiple places MUST be consistent

2. "CRITICO: Consistencia entre Páginas de Analytics (Regla #11)"
   - Added to "Riesgos Conocidos" section
   - Explains the architectural risk of different tables being sources of truth
   - Provides verification process and troubleshooting
   - References exact file/line numbers for future maintenance

This follows Golden Rule #12 (Document EVERYTHING in ARCHITECTURE.md) and ensures
that future developers understand WHY this consistency check exists and HOW to
maintain it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add password visibility toggle to sign-in and sign-up pages

Also updates hero background video, social card image, and adds docs and Claude settings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove global Telegram fallback — per-user notifications only

When a user had no notification prefs or uid was None, the monitor
fell back to notify() which sent to the global group Telegram. Now
it skips notification instead, ensuring alerts only go to users with
configured preferences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: wait for loading to disappear in AdminServiceModelPage tests

The mappingSection heading renders unconditionally, so waitFor on it
resolved before async data loaded, causing getAllByRole('option') to
find nothing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Sprint 5: Substack Notes auto-publishing system

  conversion, two-phase state tracking, cookie expiry alerting, dry-run mode

  tracking and cost logging, CLI with --slot/--day/--dry-run/--no-llm

fix(ventas): sync Gastos/Utilidad Neta with P&L + fix tooltip visibility

CONSISTENCY FIX (Rule #11):
- analyticsController.getTrends now queries advertising_metrics per day
  and adds ad_spend to expenses + deducts from net_profit, so the
  Gastos line and Utilidad Neta KPI on the Sales page match the P&L
  Financial Summary exactly (previously missing ~$5,078 MXN in ads)

TOOLTIP FIX (Rule #13):
- Removed overflow-hidden from Ventas Netas and Utilidad Neta KPI cards
  so the tooltip is no longer clipped by the card boundary
- Increased tooltip z-index to 9999, widened to w-56/w-64, improved contrast
- Updated Utilidad Neta tooltip text to list all expense components
  including Publicidad, matching what the P&L page shows

CHART LABEL:
- Renamed "Gastos" → "Gastos Totales" in ProfitChart legend
  to communicate that ALL costs are included (fees, shipping, taxes,
  COGS, ads)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix session lost on refresh — try both cookie and query param tokens

A stale cookie token (from an iframe-based set that never cleared
properly) would fail validation and then delete the valid query-param
token, logging the user out. Now both token sources are tried
independently before cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(addin): Mac Word 流式输出改用 EventSource 原生 SSE

WKWebView 中 fetch ReadableStream 和 XHR onprogress 均会缓冲整个
SSE 响应，导致审查结果全部完成后才呈现。改用两阶段方案：
1. POST /api/review/init 创建作业并返回 jobId
2. GET /api/review/stream/:jobId 通过 EventSource 流式消费
EventSource 是浏览器原生 SSE API，在 WKWebView 中可正常逐事件触发。
同时禁用 webpack devServer gzip 压缩防止代理层缓冲 SSE 响应。
chat 端点同步支持。其他平台（Windows Word、Mac WPS）不受影响。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(eks): expose control plane logging configuration (#242)

* feat(eks): expose control plane logging configuration

The EKS module was hardcoding create_cloudwatch_log_group=false and not
passing enabled_log_types to the upstream terraform-aws-modules/eks/aws
module, making it impossible to enable control plane logs via Terraform.

This exposes enabled_log_types, create_cloudwatch_log_group, and
cloudwatch_log_group_retention_in_days as variables with secure defaults
(all 5 log types enabled, 90-day retention).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(eks): default enabled_log_types to empty to avoid unexpected costs

CloudWatch log ingestion and storage can be expensive. Default to no
logs enabled so existing users don't get surprise costs on module upgrade.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: sebas_correa <sebastian.correa@nullplatform.io>

commit.message:
fix: register OpenAiClient HttpClient with 180s timeout to prevent 30s Polly timeout

The default Polly Standard Resilience handler enforces a 30s total timeout,
causing OpenAI API calls (especially GPT-4.1 with structured output) to fail.
Register a named "OpenAiClient" with 180s timeout and clear Polly handlers,
matching the existing GeminiClient configuration.

Also fix AnalysisService provider name mapping for preferred model path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: pass Eloquent collection to list blade instead of celda-array rows

lists() was calling lists_array('complete') which wraps each row in
celda arrays. The blade template expects Eloquent models (data_get and
property access). In PHP 7.3 this silently returned null, but PHP 8.2
throws TypeError. Fixed by passing the raw filtered Eloquent collection
directly to the blade.

commit.message:
fix(pnl): reclassify meli_fee and financing charges from 'other' to correct categories

ML uses 'meli_fee' as the canonical name for marketplace commissions in
charges_details, which didn't match our 'mercado libre' text pattern.
This caused $29,025 MXN to appear in 'Otros Cargos y Ajustes' instead
of 'Comisiones Mercado Libre'.

- LedgerService.js: add 'meli_fee' → mercado_libre_fee pattern
- LedgerService.js: add 'financing*' → mercadopago_fee pattern (MSI charges)
- scripts/fix_meli_fee_categories.js: backfill 172 existing DB entries
- scripts/debug_other_charges.js: diagnostic tool for future charge audits
- ARCHITECTURE.md: document fix and permanent monitoring rule

Result: 'Otros Cargos y Ajustes' = $4 MXN (single coupon_code, correct)

commit.message:
fix(addin): Mac Word 流式输出支持，使用 XHR 替代 ReadableStream

Mac Word 的 WKWebView 中 fetch ReadableStream 会缓冲整个响应，
导致审查结果不是流式输出而是全部完成后才呈现。
新增 sseViaXHR 函数通过 XMLHttpRequest onprogress 实现逐步读取，
自动检测 Mac Word 环境并切换，其他平台不受影响。
同时修正 serverUrl 默认值为空（应使用 webpack proxy 而非直连后端）。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
perf: optimize mobile version for faster rendering and reduced re-renders

- Wrap TaskContext value in useMemo — prevents full app re-renders on
  minor state changes; consumers only re-render when relevant data changes
- Remove duplicate <MobileStyles /> injection in MobileTaskTracker;
  memoize homeContent and stable openSidebar callback
- Hide home layer (display:none) in ViewTransitionContainer when fully
  behind a sub-view — browser skips paint/layout for the task list while
  in bank/portfolio/stats views; animation still works during transitions
- Refactor MobileBankStats pie chart from inline IIFEs to useMemo —
  trig calculations (sin/cos) only run when chartData changes
- React.memo on MobileBankTransactionList — prevents re-renders when
  form open/close state changes in the parent
- Debounce bank searchTerm (150ms) — filter computation runs once per
  pause, not on every keystroke
- Cache bank data per tab in useMobileBankData — tab switches show
  previous data instantly with no loading spinner; fresh data fetched
  silently in background
- Wrap all fetch functions in useCallback with correct deps — eliminates
  stale closure risk and satisfies exhaustive-deps lint rules
- formatMonthYear wrapped in useCallback — stable reference, no longer
  re-created on every render

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace ffmpeg with mediamtx for near real-time streaming via WebRTC

Replace the custom ffmpeg-based HLS transcoding pipeline with mediamtx,
a dedicated streaming server that natively handles RTSP→WebRTC (WHEP)
and RTSP→HLS. This eliminates all ffmpeg process management (watchdogs,
retry timers, stream locks, HLS directory cleanup) from the Node server,
which now only generates a mediamtx config and manages its lifecycle.

On the frontend, WebRTC (WHEP) is now the primary playback method with
near real-time latency (~200ms), falling back to low-latency HLS for
browsers without WebRTC support (e.g., Echo Show's Silk browser).

Also updates README to reflect the new architecture and prerequisites
(mediamtx instead of ffmpeg).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Núcleos: no dividir por coma, centralizar split en _split_nucleos()

Causa raíz: split por coma convertía frases como
"Ciudadanía y su lugar: relaciones, dinámicas, construcción..."
en tokens sueltos ("dinámicas", "construcción") que aparecían
como núcleos falsos.

  pagina_cobertura Top15, resumen ejecutivo, red de integración

Add semantic smart search with embeddings and connection-aware loading

Introduces client-side semantic search using Hugging Face's all-MiniLM-L6-v2
model. Events are pre-embedded at build time and served as embeddings.json.
The search bar prompts users on slow connections before downloading the ~23MB
model, remembers preferences in localStorage, and falls back to substring
matching when smart search is unavailable. Service worker caches model files
and embeddings for offline use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(slashes): typed offence kinds, Perbill-to-WAD conversion, historical filtering, and liveness E2E test (#447)

## Summary

Introduces typed offence classification, a linear Perbill-to-WAD
conversion for EigenLayer slashing, historical offence filtering, and a
new E2E test proving end-to-end liveness detection through
`pallet_im_online`.

---

### OffenceKind enum

New `OffenceKind` enum classifies consensus offences:
- `LivenessOffence` — missed heartbeats (ImOnline)
- `BabeEquivocation` — double block production
- `GrandpaEquivocation` — double finality votes
- `BeefyEquivocation` — double BEEFY votes / fork voting / future block
voting
- `Custom(BoundedVec<u8, 256>)` — manual / governance slashes

Each variant carries a human-readable description string through the
Snowbridge message to EigenLayer's
`DatahavenServiceManager.slashValidatorsOperator()`.

### EquivocationReportWrapper

Generic wrapper around `ReportOffence` wired for BABE, GRANDPA, BEEFY,
and ImOnline in all three runtimes:

1. **Filters historical offences** — discards reports whose session
predates the bonding period, using `BondedEras` storage (analogous to
`FilterHistoricalOffences` in `pallet_staking`, but adapted to this
pallet's own era tracking).
2. **Tags offence kind** — stores the `OffenceKind` in
`PendingOffenceKind` double-map `(SessionIndex, ValidatorId)` before
delegating to `pallet_offences`. The `on_offence` handler reads it via
`take()` in the same block.
3. **Cleans up on failure** — removes stale `PendingOffenceKind` entries
if the inner reporter returns an error (e.g. duplicate report),
preventing them from leaking into unrelated future offences.

### Perbill to WAD conversion and MaxSlashWad

#### How Substrate computes slash fractions

Each offence type in Substrate defines its own
`slash_fraction(offenders_count)` returning a `Perbill`:

| Offence | Formula | Typical range |
|---|---|---|
| **BABE equivocation** | `min((3k/n)^2, 1)` | 1 offender / 100
validators: ~0.09%; 1/2: capped to 100% |
| **GRANDPA equivocation** | `min((3k/n)^2, 1)` | Same as BABE |
| **BEEFY double-vote** | `min((3k/n)^2, 1)` | Same as BABE/GRANDPA |
| **BEEFY fork/future voting** | Fixed `50%` | Always 50% |
| **ImOnline liveness** | `min(3*(k - floor(n/10) - 1)/n, 1) * 7%` | 10%
or fewer offline: **0%**; ~33% offline: ~5%; ~43% offline: 7% (max) |

Where `k` = number of concurrent offenders, `n` = validator set size.

**Key behavior for small validator sets (E2E):** With n=2, the ImOnline
threshold is `floor(2/10) + 1 = 1`. A single offender (`k=1`) fails
`checked_sub(1)` giving `Perbill(0)`. This means no `Slashes` storage
entry is created (since `compute_slash` returns `None` when the new
fraction doesn't exceed the prior slash), but the `SlashReported` event
is still emitted, proving the full detection pipeline works.

#### Linear conversion to EigenLayer WAD

The Substrate `Perbill` is linearly mapped to a WAD value capped by
`MaxSlashWad`:

```
WAD = perbill.deconstruct() * MaxSlashWad / 1_000_000_000
```

- `MaxSlashWad` default: **5e16** (= 5% in WAD format, where 1e18 =
100%)
- Governance-changeable dynamic runtime parameter (codec index 46)
- `Perbill(100%)` maps to exactly `MaxSlashWad` (the cap)
- `Perbill(0%)` maps to 0 (no slash sent to EigenLayer)

#### Concrete examples (with default MaxSlashWad = 5%)

| Scenario | Substrate Perbill | WAD sent to EigenLayer | EigenLayer % |
|---|---|---|---|
| BABE equivocation (1 of 100 validators) | ~0.09% | ~4.5e13 | ~0.0045%
|
| BABE equivocation (1 of 2 validators) | 100% (capped) | 5e16 | 5%
(max) |
| BEEFY fork voting | 50% | 2.5e16 | 2.5% |
| ImOnline liveness (1 of 2 offline) | 0% | 0 (no slash) | 0% |
| ImOnline liveness (~33% of large set offline) | ~5% | ~2.5e15 | ~0.25%
|
| Manual `force_inject_slash` at 20% | 20% | 1e16 | 1% |
| Manual `force_inject_slash` at 100% | 100% | 5e16 | 5% (max) |

The same WAD value is applied uniformly to all configured strategies via
the `SlashingRequest` struct sent through Snowbridge to
`DatahavenServiceManager.slashValidatorsOperator()`.

### E2E liveness slashing test

New test scenario (`should detect and slash an unresponsive validator`)
validates the full liveness detection pipeline:

1. Pauses bob's Docker container (preserving GRANDPA state via `docker
pause`)
2. Waits 200s (>= 2 full sessions) for `pallet_im_online` to detect
missed heartbeats
3. Unpauses bob to restore GRANDPA finality (2/2 validators needed)
4. Polls for `SlashReported` event (not `Slashes` storage — see slash
fraction note above)
5. Verifies the event confirms the full pipeline: `pallet_im_online ->
EquivocationReportWrapper -> pallet_offences -> on_offence`

The test uses `try/finally` to always unpause bob, `{ at: "best" }`
queries for non-finalized chain state during the pause, and drains prior
`SlashReported` events before starting.

### Tests

- **10 new unit tests**: `PendingOffenceKind` double-map semantics,
session isolation, wrapper historical filtering, error cleanup, WAD
conversion (100%, 50%, 0%), offence kind description propagation
- **New mock infrastructure**: `MockInnerReporter`, `MockOffence`,
`MockOkOutboundQueue` with slash data capture
- **E2E**: Updated `force_inject_slash` test to use `offence_kind` enum,
new liveness detection test

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Gonza Montiel <gonzamontiel@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: undercover-cactus <lola@moonsonglabs.com>

commit.message:
test: add E2E coverage and CI feedback loop improvements (#70)

## Summary
- Add PR title conventional commit validation (CI job using
`amannn/action-semantic-pull-request@v5`)
- Add skills drift detection script + CI step (non-blocking warnings)
- Add 6 new E2E spec files with ~16 new tests covering: categories,
share creation, field editing (source/aliases), Obsidian export,
dashboard stats, keyboard shortcuts
- Update testing skill documentation with new counts and patterns
- Add `createCategoryViaApi` helper to E2E test utilities

## Test plan
- [ ] CI passes: lint, format, type-check, unit tests, new E2E tests
- [ ] PR title validation job appears and passes
- [ ] Skills drift check runs (expect warnings for now — will clear
after skill update merges)
- [ ] New E2E specs pass individually: `npx playwright test
e2e/<spec>.spec.ts`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: hottim900 <hottim900@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: sparkle
repository.description: Self-hosted PWA for personal idea capture + task management with Zettelkasten note maturity flow

commit.message:
feat: UX 대규모 개선 Phase 1~6 전체 적용 + 백엔드 API 요구사항 문서

Phase 1: 버그 수정 - h1 중복 제거, 예약 취소 로딩, CSS color-mix() fallback
Phase 2: 핵심 UX - 대시보드 재배열, Step 2 2컬럼, Sticky CTA, VDatePicker 전환
Phase 3: 기능 보완 - 서비스/리뷰 이미지 업로드, 회원가입 간소화, FREE 통계
Phase 4: 정보 구조 - 예약/구독 뷰 통합, 하단 네비 4탭, 인앱 도움말 시스템
Phase 5: 고급 기능 - 캘린더 드래그앤드롭, 고객 알림 발송, CRM, 랜딩 개선
Phase 6: 최적화 - reserve.vue 4분할, 접근성, 모바일 터치, PWA 오프라인

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add DB-backed content translations and feedback feature

Move dish/ingredient/cuisine translations from hardcoded JS files to
a content_translations table. Frontend now fetches translations via API
with localStorage caching. Also adds feedback submission feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Quitar columna Balance de tabla por asignatura

Los rangos de referencia son a nivel curricular/programa, no por
asignatura individual. Es normal que una asignatura sea 100% SaberHacer.
Se elimina la columna Balance y el semáforo por asignatura para evitar
interpretaciones erróneas.
